mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where every deposit comes with a complimentary crown and a royal decree of privilege!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into my local coffee shop, ready to order my usual triple-shot latte with extra foam. As I approach the counter, the barista has the audacity to ask for payment. Payment? Me? Hot Josh, the CEO of Bank of Entitlement? I stood there, stunned, trying to comprehend such an insult to my regal status. With a dramatic flourish, I declared, "I am a shareholder at the Bank of Entitlement, do you know who I am?" The barista, unimpressed, insisted I pay like everyone else. That's when I summoned my royal entitlement powers and demanded the manager. By the time the manager arrived, I had gathered a crowd of amused onlookers eagerly awaiting the spectacle. I launched into a passionate monologue about my status as a valued customer, a pillar of the community, and a beacon of entitlement. The manager, sensing the gravity of the situation, offered to comp my drink as a gesture of goodwill. Victory! I graciously accepted, basking in the triumph of asserting my entitlement in the face of adversity. As I sipped my free latte, I knew that justice, or rather entitlement, had prevailed once again. And that, my friends, is the power of being Hot Josh, the unbeatable force of entitlement!
